zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret FitzRalph於1135年出生在英國德比夏爾時，她的父親Ralph FitzGeremund25歲，母親Hawise Ockbrook23歲。她於大約1152年與Serlo de Grendon在英國斯塔福爾格林登結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1171年之後在英國英格蘭德比夏爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret FitzRalph于1135年出生在英国德比夏爾时，她的父亲Ralph FitzGeremund25岁，母亲Hawise Ockbrook23岁。她于大约1152年与Serlo de Grendon在英国斯塔福爾格林登结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1171年之后在英国英格兰德比夏爾。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret FitzRalph was born in 1135, in Derbyshire, England, her father, Ralph FitzGeremund, was 25 and her mother, Hawise Ockbrook, was 23. She married Serlo de Grendon about 1152, in Grindon, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1171, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret FitzRalph est née en 1135, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph FitzGeremund, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Hawise Ockbrook, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Serlo de Grendon environ 1152, à Grindon, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1171, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Egginton, Burton upon Trent St Modwen, D: Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret FitzRalph 1135 in Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph FitzGeremund 25 und ihre Mutter Hawise Ockbrook 23. Sie hat um 1152 in Grindon, Staffordshire, England Serlo de Grendon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1171 in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret FitzRalph è nata il nel 1135 nel Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Ralph FitzGeremund, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Hawise Ockbrook, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Serlo de Grendon circa 1152, nel Grindon, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1171, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret FitzRalphが1135年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ralph FitzGeremundは25歳，母Hawise Ockbrookは23歳であった。約1152年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアグリンドンでSerlo de Grendonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1171年以後にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで死去した。

ko.Egginton, Burton upon Trent St Modwen, D: 영국 더비실르 버턴 업 트렌트 스트 모드웬
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret FitzRalph(이)가 1135년 영국 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph FitzGeremund(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise Ockbrook(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1152년 영국 스태퍼드실르 그린던에서 Serlo de Grendon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1171년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret FitzRalph nasceu em 1135, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph FitzGeremund, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Ockbrook, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Serlo de Grendon aproximadamente 1152, em Grindon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1171, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Egginton, Burton upon Trent St Modwen, D: буртон упон трент ст модвен, дирбишир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret FitzRalph родилась в 1135 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph FitzGeremund было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Ockbrook, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Serlo de Grendon около 1152 г. в местности гриндон, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1171 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Serlo de Grendon aproximadamente 1152, en Grindon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1171, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
